title: senecio cajonensis
intro: Senecio cajonensis, also known as the Cajon Senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio cajonensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and providing relief from coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
